recommendations.title: She Will
recommendations.overview: Veronica, an aging film star, retreats to the Scottish countryside with her nurse Desi to recover from  a double mastectomy. While there, mysterious forces give Veronica the power to enact revenge within her dreams.

recommendations.title: Dangerous Beauty
recommendations.overview: Veronica is brilliant, gifted and beautiful, but the handsome aristocrat she loves, Marco Venier, cannot marry her because she is penniless and of questionable family. So Veronica's mother, Paola, teaches her to become a courtesan, one of the exotic

recommendations.title: Antebellum
recommendations.overview: Successful author Veronica finds herself trapped in a horrifying reality and must uncover the mind-bending mystery before it's too late.

recommendations.title: Final Girl
recommendations.overview: Veronica, the new girl in town, is lured into the woods by a group of senior boys looking to make her a victim. But the boys don't know that Veronica's been trained to handle herself in surprisingly lethal ways.

recommendations.title: Unpregnant
recommendations.overview: After discovering she can’t legally get an abortion in Missouri without her parents’ permission, teenager Veronica convinces her former best friend Bailey to take a road trip to Albuquerque to seek the procedure.

recommendations.title: Witch Hunt
recommendations.overview: In a modern America where witches are real and witchcraft is illegal, a sheltered teenager must face her own demons and prejudices as she helps two young witches avoid law enforcement and cross the southern border to asylum in Mexico.

recommendations.title: Tales from the Darkside: The Movie
recommendations.overview: A young boy tells three stories of horror to distract a witch who plans to eat him.

recommendations.title: Earwig and the Witch
recommendations.overview: A headstrong orphan discovers a world of spells and potions while living with a selfish witch.

recommendations.title: Chupa
recommendations.overview: While visiting family in Mexico, a lonely boy befriends a mythical creature hiding on his grandfather's ranch and embarks on the adventure of a lifetime.

recommendations.title: Anchorman: The Legend of Ron Burgundy
recommendations.overview: It's the 1970s and San Diego anchorman Ron Burgundy is the top dog in local TV, but that's all about to change when ambitious reporter Veronica Corningstone arrives as a new employee at his station.
